stemHtml: An aircraft is cruising at FL400 in zero wind conditions. What is the relationship between air distance and ground distance between two positions on the ground?

options.a: The air distance is slightly greater than the ground distance.
options.b: The ground distance is slightly greater than the air distance.
options.c: The air distance is much greater than the ground distance.
options.d: The air distance is equal to the ground distance.
